limitations: No failing CI log was supplied, so first-failure extraction was not exercised.
No mixed or multi-workspace ownership decision was required, so workspace ownership was not exercised.
The target repository was not revisited for this KPI review.
This record is not an endorsement by the target repository.

review_basis.finding: A read-only external trial found explicit tox configuration and produced a high-confidence manual python -m tox proof recommendation.
The preserved checkout exposed docs/conf.py, produced a strict Sphinx proof recommendation, and retained the target HEAD, tree, detached state, and clean worktree.
